name.title: Plugin Name
name.description: Display name used by Homebridge for this platform.

email.title: Monster Account Email
email.description: Email address used to sign in to the Monster Smart Lighting app.

password.title: Monster Account Password
password.description: Password used to sign in to the Monster Smart Lighting app.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Polling Interval
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often Homebridge checks Monster cloud state, in seconds. The default is 300 seconds. Lower values may update HomeKit faster but increase cloud traffic.

sceneCategories.title: Scene Accessories
sceneCategories.description: Choose which Monster scene categories to expose as HomeKit switch accessories. All scene categories are disabled by default.

static.title: Static Scenes
static.description: Expose built-in static scenes as HomeKit switch accessories.

dynamic.title: Dynamic Scenes
dynamic.description: Expose built-in dynamic scenes as HomeKit switch accessories.

custom.title: Custom Scenes
custom.description: Expose saved custom scenes as HomeKit switch accessories.

diy.title: DIY Scenes
diy.description: Expose saved DIY scenes as HomeKit switch accessories.

music.title: Music Scenes
music.description: Expose music-reactive scenes as HomeKit switch accessories.

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable extra diagnostic logging for troubleshooting. Leave disabled for normal use.
